# freeipa_sudo_command_group (Data Source)

Reads details of a FreeIPA Sudo Command Group.

## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the sudo command group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier (group name).
- `description` (String) Description of the sudo command group.
- `commands` (Set of String) Set of sudo command paths that belong to this group.
